clusters.description: Sequential runtime-state consolidation implementation. Establish the state contract first, then migrate graph/bootstrap/dispatch/result/reconciliation/cognition surfaces, and finish with compatibility/deprecation guards.

children.title: IMPLEMENT: Write runtime-state consolidation spec and migration inventory
IMPLEMENT: Add cluster-state schema and atomic state store
IMPLEMENT: Initialize cluster-state from clusters.json and preserve graph truth
IMPLEMENT: Move foreman claim and dispatch state to cluster-state
IMPLEMENT: Add sealed packet and result directories under cluster state
IMPLEMENT: Tie tracker reconciliation to validated cluster-state transitions
IMPLEMENT: Add Polaris-owned folder cognition for runtime artifacts
IMPLEMENT: Add runtime artifact deprecation guards and migration validation
